result.summary: Udemy exposes a public Instructor REST API, tenant-specific Udemy Business REST/GraphQL APIs and SCIM API, plus two MCP endpoints at api.udemy.com (one public ChatGPT endpoint and one Udemy Business MCP server).
result.description: Udemy is an online learning platform and marketplace for courses, and Udemy Business is its enterprise learning offering for organizations. The service provides course content, learner progress data, user provisioning, and AI-assisted access to tenant learning data.

instructor_bearer.label: Udemy Instructor API bearer token
instructor_bearer.setup: Sign in to your Udemy instructor account, go to [API Clients](https://www.udemy.com/user/edit-api-clients/), and request/create an API client. The page creates a `bearer token` tied to your Udemy user account for the Instructor API.

ub_scim_bearer.label: Udemy Business SCIM bearer token
ub_scim_bearer.setup: In your Udemy Business tenant, go to **Manage → Settings → Provisioning (SCIM)**, click **Start Setup**, choose provider **Custom**, then click **Generate token** and copy the bearer token. The support guide is [Configure SCIM provisioning with Udemy’s SCIM API](https://business-support.udemy.com/hc/en-us/articles/360047732153-Configure-SCIM-provisioning-with-Udemy-s-SCIM-API).

variables.name: yoursubdomain
variables.description: Tenant subdomain used to build the SCIM base URL.

variables.name: your_subdomain
variables.description: Tenant subdomain used for the Udemy Business developer portal / GraphQL API reference.

evidence: catalog fact: Known MCP server (from the openai registries): Udemy at https://api.udemy.com/mcp-chatgpt/2025-10 (authTypes: NONE)
